title: The Village Chooses to Fight
description: On pages 5–8, the village chooses to fight focuses on Nami, Arlong, Marine Captain Nezumi, Nojiko as nami’s stolen savings and Arlong’s betrayal push Cocoyashi Village into open rebellion, forcing her to ask Luffy for help.
scene: On pages 5–8, the village chooses to fight focuses on Nami, Arlong, Marine Captain Nezumi, Nojiko as nami’s stolen savings and Arlong’s betrayal push Cocoyashi Village into open rebellion, forcing her to ask Luffy for help.

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyashi villagers
dialogue.text: 8 years ago, we swore not to throw our lives away!

dialogue.speaker: Cocoyashi villagers
dialogue.text: No matter how painful it may be living under their rule, we swore that as long as Nami was fine,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We would limit ourselves to a fight of endurance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But this is how they answered us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now that our only chance of liberation has been denied,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There is no longer any hope for this island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But we shall never forgive those fishermen,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who dared to toy around with the kindness of that girl!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Any object- Tions?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Of course not! Now let's go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: As if we'd accept their rule now that things have come to this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Everyone in the whole village has always been prepared to fight!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So let's do this!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Wait, every- one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Nami...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Please just wait a little more! I'll try my best again so please!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Haha...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I promise I'll raise enough money once more!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It'll actually be easier this time!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: NAC- chan...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Do I

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You sure can think up pretty heartless things...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Chu (1

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hmph, as if I'd just let a cartographer as talented as her get away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But even so, I'm no demon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll set her free once she makes a map of all the world's oceans!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Puhaha haha! How many decades is that gonna take!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's enough...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You know that doing such a thing would be futile. You've carried all our hope alone for long enough.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...you've fought splendidly...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I know that working with them must've been more painful than a thousand searing knives.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You've fought well.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Gen...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You can now leave,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: This village.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: NAMI...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You're cunning and you've got what it takes to survive out there!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Besides, you've got a dream to fulfill!

dialogue.speaker: Nojiko
dialogue.text: Nojiko...!

summary: This part turns Nami’s private suffering into an open crisis, ending with the emotional choice to rely on Luffy.
